name: CompTIA Network+
description: Vendor-neutral networking certification covering protocols, routing, switching, infrastructure, and network troubleshooting.

name: CompTIA Security+
description: Industry-standard certification covering network security, threats, vulnerabilities, cryptography, identity management, and risk management.

name: GICSP — Global Industrial Cyber Security Professional
description: Specialized certification for industrial control system (ICS) and operational technology (OT) security. Highly relevant to embedded systems and critical infrastructure research.

name: CCNA — Cisco Certified Network Associate
description: Comprehensive networking certification covering IP addressing, routing protocols, network security fundamentals, and Cisco IOS configuration.
